name: codex-augment-dispatcher
description: Route Codex work through extensible external CLI adapters for planning, brainstorming, research, review, frontend, and Plugin evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-route planning, research, stuck, review, and frontend work to helper CLIs.
interface.longDescription: Codex Augment Dispatcher is an extensible adapter hub for external CLIs and Codex background thread fanout while preserving Codex as the local executor. It should be considered for non-trivial tasks and explicitly triggered by planning/decomposition, stuck/brainstorming, current research/latest info, external critique/risk review, creative direction, frontend/UI/landing page/redesign/animation, browser visual verification, and Grok video requests. The initial adapters are Claude task-gate/thinking-gate, Grok augment, and AGY frontend. Future CLI adapters can be added as separate skills, scripts, tests, and dispatch rules without renaming the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Before non-trivial work, classify the route; required helper routes need Plugin evidence.
Route plan/stuck/research/review/frontend work through task-gate, thinking-gate, grok-augment, or agy-frontend.
Use read-only Codex background threads only as advisory; Codex owns edits, verification, commits, and final claims.
